mapper.select: select count(*) from bbs_t where active = 0
select * from bbs_t where active = 0 order by b_idx desc limit #{numPerPage} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert:
insert into bbs_t (subject, writer, content, f_name, pwd, hit) values ( #{subject}, #{writer}, #{content},
#{f_name} '' , #{pwd}, 0 )
mapper.update: update bbs_t set hit = hit + 1 where b_idx = #{b_idx}
update bbs_t set active=1 where b_idx = #{b_idx}
mapper.select: select * from comment_t where b_idx = #{b_idx} and active = 0 order by c_idx asc
mapper.insert: insert into comment_t(b_idx, writer, content,pwd, write_date) values(#{b_idx}, #{writer}, #{content},#{pwd}, now())
mapper.update: update comment_t set active = 1 where c_idx = #{c_idx}
